meta.title: DJR Photography | David J. Richards - Eye to Eye With the Moment
meta.description: DJR Photography tells the story of David J. Richards behind the lens: sports, family, creative studio work, and the moments that reveal a person.

creativeFeature.title: Based on a true story of perseverance and a camera.
creativeFeature.body: The AI poster and press-pass portrait are not presented as documentary photography. They are part of the dream language around David's work: what it feels like when persistence, imagination, and a camera start opening doors.

images.alt: Eye to Eye movie poster concept
Stylized David with camera and press pass

about.title: Not just a gallery. A point of view.
about.body: David J. Richards is building his voice as a photographer one frame at a time. His work moves between sports, family, studio practice, creative experiments, and everyday details. The common thread is attention: looking long enough to notice the thing other people might miss.

cta.title: Help David keep building the story.
cta.sub: Book a session, invite him to cover a game or event, or follow along as DJR Photography grows from a dream into a body of work.

pictureOfTheWeek.title: The Sideline Becomes the Studio
pictureOfTheWeek.body: David does not just take pictures from the edge of the action. He studies the field, waits for the face, the posture, the light, and the split second where a person becomes the story.
pictureOfTheWeek.imageAlt: David J. Richards holding a camera on the football sideline

story.title: A camera became David's way of stepping into the world.
story.lead: DJR Photography is not a polished brand invented in a boardroom. It is a real person learning to look closely, move with purpose, and tell people, places, games, and family stories through the lens.
story.body: The images here show the full arc: practice in the studio, cold nights on the track, a long lens aimed at the next play, a family moment, a reflection in sunglasses, and the dream of seeing his own story treated like cinema.
story.quote: The dream. The hard work. The moment. The capture.

services.title: Photography With a Point of View

items.title: Behind the Lens
items.text: Portraits of the process: practice, focus, and the confidence that grows with every shot.

items.title: Human Moments
items.text: Warm, honest images where connection matters more than posing.

items.title: Creative Details
items.text: Color, texture, reflection, and small visual surprises that make a scene feel personal.

items.title: Sports Energy
items.text: Sideline focus, game-day atmosphere, and the emotion around the play.

items.title: The Bigger Dream
items.text: Poster-style storytelling and imagined scenes that turn a personal journey into cinema.

items.title: Point of View
items.text: Self-portraits, reflections, and experiments with how a photographer sees himself.
